title: Badge: Budget Kid
resultGreatDescription: You made {{score}} smart budgeting decisions out of {{total}} challenges!
skillsDescription: You learned to plan your spending, track your money, do budget math, and stick to your budget!
wisdomDescription: These habits will help you manage your money wisely and reach your goals!
resultKeepDescription: You made {{score}} smart budgeting decisions out of {{total}} challenges.
resultKeepTip: Remember, budgeting means planning your spending, tracking your money, and making thoughtful financial decisions.

challenges.title: Smart Choice Badge
challenges.question: You get Rs 100 as pocket money for a week. What is the smartest first step?

options.text: Decide how much to save and spend
Spend it on the first day

feedback.correct: Excellent! Thinking before spending earns you a smart badge!
feedback.wrong: Planning how to save and spend helps you use money wisely!

challenges.title: Needs vs Wants
challenges.question: You see a notebook you need and a toy you want. You can buy only one. What do you choose?

feedback.correct: Great choice! Needs always come before wants!
feedback.wrong: Buying what you need first is a smart money habit!

challenges.title: Saving Power
challenges.question: You save Rs 10 every day. How much do you save in 5 days?

feedback.correct: Awesome math! Small savings grow fast!
feedback.wrong: Rs 10 saved for 5 days becomes Rs 50!

challenges.title: Spending Control
challenges.question: You plan to buy snacks for Rs 20 but see a bigger pack for Rs 40. What is the best move?

feedback.correct: Well done! Following your plan shows great control!
feedback.wrong: Sticking to your plan keeps your budget safe!

challenges.title: Goal Achiever
challenges.question: You want to buy a book next month. What helps you reach this goal?

options.text: Waiting for someone else to buy it

feedback.correct: Fantastic! Saving regularly helps you reach goals!
feedback.wrong: Small weekly savings help you buy things you plan for!
